name: permission-deny-via-mode
description: Permission resolver denies the tool because permissionMode='dontAsk' with no allowedTools. The harness short-circuits BEFORE pre_tool dispatch (and BEFORE permission_request hook fires — dontAsk does not consult hooks), emits a synthetic denied_by_permissions output, and the LLM produces text instead. Verifies pre_tool / post_tool / permission_request all stay silent.
